seoTitle: Torrens Island vs Torrens Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Torrens Island and Torrens Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Torrens Island vs Torrens Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Torrens Island and Torrens Vale.
heading: Torrens Island vs Torrens Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Torrens Island, South Australia and Torrens Vale, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Torrens Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Torrens Island (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Torrens Island or Torrens Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Torrens Island has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Torrens Vale scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Torrens Island scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Torrens Vale scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Torrens Island or Torrens Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Torrens Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
